title: Iranian Attacks on Jordan Highlight Kingdom’s Difficult Position
summary_full: Iran’s military said it fired missiles at a Jordanian air base used by American forces. Jordan said it had intercepted missiles entering its air space.
summary_public: Iran’s military said it fired missiles at a Jordanian air base used by American forces. Jordan said it had intercepted missiles entering its air space.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran’s military said it fired missiles

JO.label: negative
JO.evidence: Jordan said it had intercepted missiles
